headerDisplay: Go to [http://${{HOSTNAME}}:8999](http://${{HOSTNAME}}:8999) to enter the PIN when your TV displays it, then use the same address to open the Channel Selector UI

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of your TV in HomeKit

ip.title: IP / Hostname
ip.description: The IP address or host name of your TV, find or set in your router

serverPort.title: PIN entry / Channel Selector server port

channelSelectorPort.title: Channel Selector port override
channelSelectorPort.description: Override the port used for the Channel Selector web UI (defaults to serverPort)

enableChannelSelector.title: Enable Channel Selector UI
enableChannelSelector.description: Enables the web-based Channel Selector. Disable if you don't need it.

maxInputSources.title: Max Input Sources
maxInputSources.description: Maximum number of inputs to register in HomeKit. HomeKit hard limit is 98. Defaults to 98.

mac.title: MAC address
mac.description: DO NOT set unless you need to use WOL

externalaccessory.title: External Accessory
externalaccessory.description: Workaround for multiple TVs and remote app, registers this TV as an external accessory

debug.title: Debug Log Output
debug.description: Gives additional debug output in the log

tvsource.title: TV Source
tvsource.description: Select TV input to display TV channels in the input list

applications.title: App
applications.description: Leave empty to not list TV apps in the input list, add app names to show those apps. A part of the name should suffice.

sources.title: Source
sources.description: Defaults to: [extInput:hdmi, extInput:component, extInput:scart, extInput:cec, extInput:widi]. Adding entries to the list below will only show those inputs.
